/cwe/weakness/233.Name: Improper Handling of Parameters
/cwe/weakness/233.Description: The product does not properly handle when the expected number of parameters, fields, or arguments is not provided in input, or if those parameters are undefined.

Entries.IntroText: This Android application has registered to handle a URL when sent an intent:

Entries.BodyText: The application assumes the URL will always be included in the intent. When the URL is not present, the call to getStringExtra() will return null, thus causing a null pointer exception when length() is called.
